arts.ttl: Celtic's hefty Jeff Schlupp wage contribution revealed
arts.sum: Celtic will pay half of Jeffrey Schlupp's Crystal Palace wage, according to reports.

arts.ttl: The Celtic manager Chris Sutton says was 'a little bit weird'
arts.sum: The arrival of Gordon Strachan signalled the end of Sutton’s Celtic career as the former striker shares how he ‘didn’t see eye-to-eye’ with the ex-Hoops boss. Chris Sutton says ‘odd’ Celtic boss ‘turned me over’ in contract talks

arts.ttl: Arne Engels reveals personal Celtic goals and assists target
arts.sum: Celtic midfielder Arne Engels wants to reach 10 goals and 10 assists across all competitions before the season ends.

arts.ttl: Celtic move to clear up incorrect UEFA away ban reports with a statement
arts.sum: Celtic move to clear up incorrect UEFA away ban reports with a statement.

arts.ttl: Celtic to hold 'special presentation' before Dundee match
arts.sum: Celtic will hold a special presentation on the pitch before their game against Dundee this evening for captain Callum McGregor.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney faces final Arsenal indignity at hands of Mikel Arteta as Celtic told the player they are REALLY getting
arts.sum: The left-back is destined for Celtic in the summer but it could be a long few months at the Emirates before a return

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Celtic will bid to take another step closer to the Scottish Premiership title when Dundee visit Parkhead this evening. Brendan Rodgers’ side can move 13 points clear of nearest challengers Rangers with three points. It’s shaping up to be a memorable campaign for Celtic, who have also reached the Champions League’s knockout rounds for the […] The post Celtic vs Dundee – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Blair Spittal shares hilarious encounter with Celtic's Alistair Johnston which was 'uncalled for'
arts.sum: Hearts star Blair Spittal was talking about playing against the champions and what it is like, before talk turned to Johnston . “Who did you play (up against), is it Johnston (when you faced Celtic),” asked Si Ferry to which Spittal responded: “Aye”.

arts.ttl: 'Like Henrik Larsson': Daizen Maeda moment earns elite comparison
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has likened Daizen Maeda's header against Motherwell to a goal that Henrik Larsson would have scored.

arts.ttl: Celtic still awaiting UEFA decision on potential Munich away support ban
arts.sum: Celtic are still awaiting their fate regarding away fans in Munich, contrary to reports.
